steps.title: Count the possible vertices
steps.content: A polygon with $13$ sides has $13$ vertices. Because the letters $A$ through $M$ are all used once, exactly one vertex is labeled $H$.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability is the number of favorable outcomes divided by the number of equally likely outcomes.
$$P=\frac{1}{13}$$
The answer is 1/13.
